name: Wa Mashait Tareq Al Akhtar
overview: The series takes place in the framework of my teaser of Melodrama, where the girl (Lubna) the school whose fiance is unjustly imprisoned, disguised the character of the widow (Narcisus) for revenge of the family, which was the cause of this extent, and during her living with this family, she is related to them and the events continue, where she begins to reveal facts that she did not know about her fiance.

trailers.title: مسلسل ومشيت طريق الأخطار الحلقة الأولى
